gemini-3.1-flash-tts-preview.description: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS Preview — expressive low-latency speech synthesis
gemini-3.1-flash-tts-preview.pricingTier: Gemini API paid Standard speech-generation pricing
gemini-3.1-flash-tts-preview.pricingNotes: Gemini TTS estimates use published character pricing of $1/1M input characters and $20/1M output characters. Free tier, batch/flex/priority prices, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.
